description: A customer with a recurring subscription needs to update the credit card used for their monthly payments.

nodes.task_description: Provide the customer with a secure portal or link to update their payment information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent guides the customer to the secure payment update form.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the new payment method has been successfully saved for the subscription.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the update in the system.
